svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Design Thinking Process</text>
  
  <!-- Empathize -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Empathize
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Define -->
  <rect x="170" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Define
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Ideate -->
  <rect x="290" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Ideate
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Prototype -->
  <rect x="290" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Prototype
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Test -->
  <rect x="170" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Test
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Implement -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Implement
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Circular arrows -->
  <path d="M 100 110 C 100 120 220 130 220 110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M 220 110 C 240 110 260 110 280 110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M 340 110 C 340 120 340 130 340 140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M 340 150 C 320 150 300 150 280 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M 220 150 C 200 150 180 150 160 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M 100 150 C 100 140 100 130 100 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Center circle -->
  <circle cx="210" y="110" r="40" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Iterate
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
